content: • Overview • General Modeling Rules o 📘Subscriptions § 🔹 Responsibility Requirement § 🔹 Change of Responsibility § 🔹 Automated Quality Checks o 📘 Lifecycle Management in LeanIX Fact Sheets § 🔹 Recommended Practice § 🔹 Benefits o 📘Organizational Responsibilities § Responsibility at the Organizational Structure Level § 🔹 Example § 🔹 Key Principles § Responsibility at the Process Organization Level § 🔹 Assignment Guidelines § 🔹 Key Principles o 📘 Modeling Version History with Successor and Predecessor Relations § Best Practice for Unused Relations § 🔹 Key Principles o 📘 Modeling Hierarchies with Parent/Child Relations in LeanIX § 🔹 Usage Guidelines § 🔹 Special Rule for IT Products § 🔹 Best Practices § 🔹 Benefits • 📊 LLM-Ready Structure Summary (LeanIX Modeling Guidelines)

key_concepts: Responsible & Observer roles for Fact Sheets
rules__requirements: - Each Fact Sheet must have at least one Responsible person - Responsible receives notifications and acts as contact
best_practices: - Assign successors when roles change - Use automated checks to maintain data quality
exceptions__warnings: - If no Responsible exists, system escalates to manager or department head
benefits: - Ensures accountability - Maintains data accuracy - Supports governance

rules__requirements: - Lifecycle assignment may be mandatory depending on Fact Sheet type
best_practices: - Always provide Go-Live and Decommissioning dates - Include additional milestones if relevant
benefits: - Supports strategic planning - Enables impact analysis - Ensures compliance

rules__requirements: - At least one responsibility must be defined - IT responsibility mandatory if modeling guidelines require it
best_practices: - Assign to lowest organizational level (e.g., Subdepartment) - Use ART or Portfolio Fact Sheets for process-level responsibility
exceptions__warnings: - Do not assign higher-level units (e.g., FDB instead of FDB1) - Only use Fact Sheets tagged "Synced" or "Manual"
benefits: - Enables traceability - Aligns with governance - Improves reporting

rules__requirements: - Use when creating new versions of Fact Sheets - Apply even if older version is still active
best_practices: - If not applicable, explicitly set field to “Leave empty”
benefits: - Clarifies version transitions - Improves data quality

rules__requirements: - Parent = higher-level entity - Child = subordinate entity
best_practices: - Use for grouping related Fact Sheets - Document rationale in description field - Explicitly set to “Leave empty” if not applicable
exceptions__warnings: - For IT Products, use only after consulting Portfolio Architect and LeanIX team - Avoid circular or ambiguous relationships
benefits: - Improves navigability - Enables structured reporting - Supports impact analysis
